title: Spicy Creamy Tomato Stir-fry
description: A savory, creamy, monsoon Argentinean dish featuring a unique blend of flavors including passion fruit pulp to add a tropical twist.

ingredients.name: cream cheese or vegan cream cheese alternative (optional)

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and minced garlic, sauté until softened.
Chop tomatoes into bite-sized pieces and add to the skillet with the onions. Cook for about 5 minutes or until tomatoes soften.
Pour passion fruit pulp, ketchup, and spicy sauce into the skillet. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Add kosher salt to taste, and cook for another minute.
If using cream cheese, stir it into the mixture gently until fully incorporated.
Stir in chopped fresh basil leaves and parsley before serving hot.
